segments.text: Hi everyone, welcome to the Snow Centre.
segments.translation: 大家好，欢迎来到Snow中心。

segments.text: My name's Annie.
segments.translation: 我是安妮。

segments.text: I hope you enjoyed the bus trip from the airport - we've certainly got plenty of snow today!
segments.translation: 希望大家会享受这段从机场出发的巴士旅程——今天的雪已经下得很大了。

segments.text: Well, you've come to New Zealand's premier snow and ski centre, and we've a whole load of activities for you during your week here.
segments.translation: 您来到的是新西兰首屈一指的滑雪中心，在这一周的时间里，我们为您安排了很多活动。

segments.text: Most visitors come here for the cross-country skiing, where you're on fairly flat ground for most of the time, rather than going down steep mountainsides.
segments.translation: 大多数游客来这里是为了越野滑雪，在这里，大部分滑雪路线经过的不是陡峭的山路，而是相对平坦的路面。

segments.text: There are marked trails, but you can also leave these and go off on your own and that's an experience not to be missed.
segments.translation: 这有被标好的路径，但您也可以不用理会，走自己的路，这是一个不能错过的体验。

segments.text: You can go at your own speed - it's great aerobic exercise if you really push yourself, or if you prefer you can just glide gently along and enjoy the beautiful scenery.
segments.translation: 可以按照自己的速度来——如果您能前进（速度比较快），它将是一项非常好的有氧运动，或者如果您喜欢慢慢滑的话，您可以享受沿途美丽的风景。

segments.text: This afternoon, you'll be going on a dog-sled trip.
segments.translation: 今天下午，您将进行一场狗拉雪橇之旅。

segments.text: You may have seen our dogs on TV recently racing in the winter sled festival.
segments.translation: 您最近可能已经在电视上看到过我们冬季雪橇节的狗狗比赛。

segments.text: If you want, you can have your own team for the afternoon and learn how to drive them, following behind our leader on the trail.
segments.translation: 如果您愿意的话，下午您可以拥有自己的队伍，并跟随在我们的领队后面学习如何驾驭它们。

segments.text: Or if you'd prefer, you can just sit back in the sled and enjoy the ride as a passenger.
segments.translation: 或者如果您喜欢，您可以作为乘客坐在雪橇上来享受这段旅程。

segments.text: At the weekend, we have the team relay event, and you're all welcome to join in.
segments.translation: 在周末，我们会有团队接力活动，欢迎您的加入。

segments.text: We have a local school coming along, and a lot of the teachers are taking part too.
segments.translation: 有一所当地的学校要来，并且很多老师也会参加。

segments.text: Participation rather than winning is the main focus, and there's a medal for everyone who takes part.
segments.translation: 我们更注重参与，而不是获胜，并且每名参与者都会获得一块奖牌。

segments.text: Participants are in teams of two to four, and each team must complete four laps of the course.
segments.translation: 参赛者会被分为两到四人一组，每组必须完成四圈。

segments.text: For your final expedition, you'll head off to Mount Frenner wearing a pair of special snow shoes which allow you to walk on top of the snow.
segments.translation: 您的最后一次探险将需要穿着一双特殊的雪鞋前往弗伦纳山，雪鞋方便您在雪地行走。

segments.text: This is an area where miners once searched for gold, though there are very few traces of their work left now.
segments.translation: 矿工曾经在这片区域搜索过黄金，不过现在他们工作的痕迹已经基本消失了。

segments.text: When the snow melts in summer, the mountain slopes are carpeted in flowers and plants.
segments.translation: 夏天冰雪融化时，山坡上长满了花草。

segments.text: It's a long ascent, though not too steep, and walkers generally take a couple of days to get to the summit and return.
segments.translation: 这是一个很长的上坡路，虽然不是很陡峭，但步行者通常需要几天时间才能登顶并返回。

segments.text: You'll spend the night in our hut half-way up the mountain.
segments.translation: 你将在我们半山腰上的小屋里过夜。

segments.text: That's included in your package for the stay.
segments.translation: 这已经包括在您的住宿费用里了。

segments.text: It's got cooking facilities, firewood and water for drinking.
segments.translation: 这有烹饪设施，木柴和饮用水。

segments.text: For washing, we recommend you use melted snow, though, to conserve supplies.
segments.translation: 不过，我们建议您使用融化的雪来清洗衣物以节省供给。

segments.text: We can take your luggage up on our snowmobile for you for just ten dollars a person.
segments.translation: 我们可以用我们的雪地摩托帮你把行李搬上去，每人只要十美元。

segments.text: The hut has cooking facilities so you can make a hot meal in the evening and morning, but you need to take your own food.
segments.translation: 小屋有烹饪设施，所以您可以早晚做一顿热饭，但您需要自己带食物。

segments.text: The weather on Mount Frenner can be very stormy.
segments.translation: 弗伦纳山上有时会有很大的暴风雨。

segments.text: In that case, stay in the hut - generally the storms don't last long.
segments.translation: 在那种情况下，待在小屋里——通常暴风雨不会持续太久。

segments.text: Don't stress about getting back here to the centre in time to catch the airport bus - they'll probably not be running anyway.
segments.translation: 不要赶着回到这个中心以赶上机场巴士——他们很可能无法运行。

segments.text: We do have an emergency locator beacon in the hut but only use that if it's a real emergency, like if someone's ill or injured.
segments.translation: 我们在小屋里有一个紧急定位标，但只有在真正紧急的情况下才能使用，比如有人生病或受伤。

segments.text: Now, let me tell you something about the different ski trails you can follow during your stay here.
segments.translation: 现在，让我来为您介绍一些逗留期间可以尝试的不同滑雪道。

segments.text: Highland Trail's directly accessible from where we are now.
segments.translation: 从我们现在的位置可以直接到达高地小径。

segments.text: This trail's been designed to give first-timers an experience they'll enjoy regardless of their age or skill, but it's also ideal for experts to practise their technique.
segments.translation: 这条小径是为新手设计的，无论他们的年龄和技能如何，他们都能享受（这种体验），但对于专家来说，这也是他们练习技术的理想选择。

segments.text: Then there's Pine Trail ... if you're nervous about skiing, leave this one to the experts!
segments.translation: 接下来还有松树小径……如果您对滑雪感到紧张，就把这（条路）留给高手吧!

segments.text: You follow a steep valley looking right down on the river below - scary!
segments.translation: 沿着一个陡峭的山谷往下看，正好能看到下面的河——太可怕了！

segments.text: But if you've fully mastered the techniques needed for hills, it's great fun.
segments.translation: 但是如果您已经完全掌握了坡道所需要的技巧，那就非常有趣了。

segments.text: Stony Trail's a good choice once you've got a general idea of the basics.
segments.translation: 一旦您对基础方法有了一个大致的了解，石质小径是一个不错的选择。

segments.text: There are one or two tricky sections, but nothing too challenging.
segments.translation: 那里会有一两处区域比较困难，但没有太大的挑战性。

segments.text: There's a shelter half-way where you can sit and take a break and enjoy the afternoon sunshine.
segments.translation: 半路上有一个休息区，您可以坐在那里休息，享受午后的阳光。

segments.text: And finally, Loser's Trail.
segments.translation: 最后是失败者小径。

segments.text: This starts off following a gentle river valley but the last part is quite exposed so the snow conditions can be challenging - if it's snowing or windy, check with us before you set out to make sure the trail's open that day.
segments.translation: 它从一个温和的河谷开始，但是最后一部分是完全暴露的，如果下雪或刮风，雪情可能很有挑战性的。您在出发前务必和我们确认当天小路是否开放。

segments.text: Right, so now if you'd like to follow me, we'll get started ...
segments.translation: 好了，现在如果您想跟我来，我们就开始……
